text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, found you. Hey, do you<n>remember what
we talked about the<n>other day?
choice_data_list:
You mean about discovering for your womanly
charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! ☆ My search for my inner<n>womanly
charm... And I want you to<n>help out today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All righty... Let's get moving!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before I know what's happening,<n>I'm being
pulled along by the hand<n>until we arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just like that. Focus your mind right<n>down to your
fingertips. Then<n>concentrate on your ears and tail.
Try<n>not to make any unnecessary<n>movements.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee willikers! You look splend'd,<n>Curren! Why,
you're so lov'ly, I've<n>fallen head ov'r heels for
ya!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got womanly charm and the<n>means to
show it off! I knew City<n>was the right person to
ask! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: That's City for you. Sigh... Withprop'r guidance, I wonder if I can bejust as charm'n someday...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Caught your fancy? Want to give it a<n>shot?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
What?! N-n-n-nooo! I'll pass! I don't<n>wanna get
in th'way!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: But... m-maybe some oth'r time...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Then it's a promise! ☆ Let's all<n>three of us
come up with a pose and<n>take some pics
sometime! ☆

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: S-sure!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get back to it! Maybe a<n>pose like
this next... Trainer, take the<n>pic! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: How about this one, next?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Dearie me! You look like the council<n>president. So
polish'd!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Next up... this one!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, now you look like Brian!<n>Rough around
th'edges, but so cool!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...As I thought, you really how to hold<n>yourself in
front of a camera.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! ♪ Now just let me go over the<n>photos
real quick and upload them to<n>Uma...sta...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... And maybe this one for the<n>future...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... #WomanlyCurren<n>#LookinCool
#IsYourHeartPoundingYet?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Zoinkies! You're amazing, Curren!<n>Over ten
thous'nd likes in th'blink of<n>an eye... Ooh, and
you've got<n>comments to boot!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
My heart's pounding a little different<n>than usual.
"I like Curren Chan cute,<n>but I'm liking this totally
new<n>womanly side of her too!"

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the comments, it looks like<n>her photos
have been well received.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. The photos look great. But...<n>there's
something I can't quite put<n>my finger on...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, I knew it. Something's not<n>right, is it?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But I think you're look'n<n>mighty fine in
these photos. Like a<n>real city girl...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! But still...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I don't know... It's like, is thismy kind of womanly charm?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tilting her neck in that adorable way<n>of hers,
Curren Chan quietly<n>expresses her doubt.
